name: Button
description: Pill-shaped CTA component. All buttons use border-radius 999px — never square, never 8px rounded. Primary for main actions, Outline for secondary, Ghost for tertiary/navigation.

variant.description: Visual style. Primary: solid black fill, white text. Outline: border only. Ghost: text with trailing arrow.

size.description: Default: 16px text, 12px/32px padding. Small: 13px text, 8px/24px padding.

disabled.description: Disabled state — 40% opacity, no pointer events.

children.description: Button label text. Keep short — 1-3 words.

href.description: If provided, renders as anchor tag instead of button.

states.hover: Primary: terracotta-140 bg. Outline: terracotta border + text. Ghost: terracotta text.
states.pressed: Primary: terracotta-60 bg. Outline: terracotta-60 border + text.

anti_patterns: Never use square corners on buttons
Never place two primary buttons in the same viewport
Never use terracotta as button background in default state — only on hover
Ghost buttons always have trailing arrow →
Never use italic text on buttons

usage_guidelines.primary: Main page CTA — 'View work', 'Get in touch'. One per viewport.
usage_guidelines.outline: Secondary actions — 'Download CV', 'Learn more'. Can appear alongside primary.

accessibility.min_contrast: WCAG AA — white on #111111 (primary), #111111 on white (outline/ghost)
